'''Pucumir Thryss''' was a former [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna gas]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]]. He was one of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion's]] contacts on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] before it was [[Occupation of Bespin|captured]] and taken over by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He left [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] for [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] in order to hide from the Imperials. Thryss always wished he could return to Cloud City and retake it.<ref name="CCG" /><ref name="Who's Who" />

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his friends came to the palace to [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|rescue]] [[Han Solo]], Thryss cheerfully looked on as Skywalker was attacked by [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|Jabba's rancor]].<ref name="ROTJ" />
